description: run a NeMo Evaluator spec against a running NeMo Platform via `nemo evaluator evaluate run`
rules: assumes cwd is the Nvidia-NeMo/nemo-platform repo root with the Python venv active (`source .venv/bin/activate`)
prefer --spec-file over inline shell JSON because metric bundles include serialized payloads
never print secrets to stdout — they can be collected as logs
plugin CLI surface is `nemo evaluator` (the legacy `nemo evaluation` group is not the target)
results are saved into local temp dirs and the link is printed to stdout; `submit` returns a durable job handle
usage: Set SPEC_FILE to an absolute path of an evaluation spec JSON (metrics + dataset + optional target). Output: eval_run.json (audit) under record_store. Use `nemo evaluator metric-types` / `evaluate explain` to author the spec; example specs ship in assets/specs.
limitation: Requires a running NeMo Platform server, the `nemo` CLI on PATH, valid auth/API keys, and (for the LLM-judge metric) a reachable judge endpoint. Cannot evaluate offline. The vendored generate_example_specs.py additionally needs the `nemo_evaluator` / `nemo_evaluator_sdk` Python packages.
